## Summary

Describe the change and the spec or issue it addresses.

## Verification

- [ ] Focused tests added or updated where behavior changed
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --all-targets`

## Documentation

- [ ] Documentation and `STATUS.md` are current, or no update is needed

## Security

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or private target data are included
- [ ] This change is not a public report of a security vulnerability
